{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324103114EF9CDA0E9096EB34FB03"}"},"total":3788},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7317571089101308723","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材内容好新颖[爱慕]我还没有在西红柿上看过这样写的作者，大大的脑洞真的很大啊啊啊[爱心]
呆萌钓系美人vs宠夫狂魔的商界大佬
一个是表面看起来软萌软萌的呆包穿越者，另一个是整天有八百个心眼子来逗呆包玩的霸总。
最重要的是他哥哥！在外人面前是为了家产而控制他弟弟，可到了弟弟面前确是实打实的宠弟狂魔，就算弟弟做错事第一反应也是和弟弟吵起来的人错的[舔屏]
我好喜欢男主他哥，宠弟狂魔简直了！
这本对我来说没有雷点，要说有的话那就是不够看[求爆更]哈哈开玩笑开玩笑。其实角色关系有的复杂了，我看到最后还是没明白书里的男女主还有那个男二到底是啥意思[捂脸]导致我有点蒙，后面也没想到作者还会把名字换掉。不过也不影响观看。而且大大好会写书其中特别喜欢“只要我没认输 我就没输”这句话
顶推啊家人们！上上上！不好看你找我"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703756222,"group_id":"7297615351473245196","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"叉叉叉莫氏心理健康中心莫夫人是临空市小茉莉","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3uBLvq8wvg510NCUmjhR9f5ZWfFEXZ4EcHL0lEHNCTv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/542c76bba6a74f83b24c972e9238e0f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875488&x-signature=SKA%2F%2FMcbiGkuP8N8GZLaysg%2B3gg%3D","user_id":"1346238075383998","user_name":"有黑眼圈的大熊猫."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1346238075383998","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1658127705,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7297615351473245196","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主】+【穿书】+【甜宠】+【悬疑】！！！

好消息，祁肆重生了！
坏消息，穿进了一本古早虐恋霸总文里。
更糟糕的是，他是为主角的伟大爱情添砖加瓦的炮灰男配。
原剧情中祁肆为了女二疯狂针对女主，最后被男主一巴掌拍死。
并且连累自己的家人，最终家破人亡。
祁肆看着这个剧情只觉得有病。
不喜欢女配也不喜欢女主的祁肆，果断弃演，准备专心吃喝玩乐当个二世祖。
结果剧情之力强大，他家的公司还是濒临破产。
无奈之下，祁肆为了保住自家产业和哥哥，只好去抱书中那位唯一能镇压住男主的大 BOSS——男主的小叔的大腿。
谁知道抱着抱着，就被抱回了家。
祁肆：？？？
……
小剧场：
某日，男主薄赋予去找自己小叔商量事情，却看到自己小叔跟祁肆在一起。
薄赋予：你怎么跟我小叔在一起？
祁肆：你猜？
薄赋予怒喝道：你离我小叔远一点！
祁肆：……那我走？
薄雁栖从身后一把握住祁肆的腰，目光凛冽地看着大侄子：要走也是他走。
薄赋予：？？？
我以为你想跟我抢女人，结果你想抢的是我小叔？！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9bc5c27fd9cbc2f81d4ffdad20fbe2a","author":"苏饵","author_id":"","book_id":"7297615351473245196","book_name":"别人穿书抢女主，我抢男主小叔","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7297615428946559500","read_count":"42496","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1109956"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"502","tags":"双男主,现代,总裁,穿越,穿书,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b93be3488508bb42bbc7dbaf2b179789~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779503474&x-signature=X6AQ5ba%2F2uk0jIQQmuQRoxc%2Fb0U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"78961301608","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"132"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324103114EF9CDA0E9096EB34FB03"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":340,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16034,"reply_count":22,"show_pv":174911},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1703764988,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7490686862912668440","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体来说还是挺好看的[你细品]，我是真挺喜欢这个弟控哥哥的[害羞]，当然男主们我也是挺喜欢滴[送心]。剧情也是挺紧凑的，悬疑那一段尤为带派[你细品]，刚好和我的阅读兴趣对口，让人很难不爱呀[害羞]。篇幅也把握的恰到好处，不会让我在有其他娱乐项目的情况下感到冗长，无从下手（这点对我来说很重要）。至于为什么是四颗星，我也不太能用什么好的语言描述出个什么所以然来，但我就是通读之后感觉有点怪怪滴[盯]，可能是我娱乐圈类的之前看的有点多，有点精神疲乏（无意冒犯，求放过🌚🌝）[捂脸]。","text_exts":[{"e":206,"s":203,"text":"娱乐圈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E5%9C%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774319474EB34FB03%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227490686862912668440%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227297615351473245196%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E5%9C%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744069291,"group_id":"7297615351473245196","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没有什么困难战胜不了我","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3RcOXvC4pkKcaaeqj0OVSUlYdNyokOeNk1FFsne2Q//","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5ac19edd7a594ca1b50655e2933602e0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875211&x-signature=tSN35cLTFSZH5WzEjYiutD9imX8%3D","user_id":"3123090128117511","user_name":"谜之作案饕小客"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3123090128117511","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":fa
